category_sources: Official retrodev.com project page lists BlastEm as an emulator for Sega Genesis/Megadrive.
source_facts.description says BlastEm is a fast and accurate Genesis emulator.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is blastem; official retrodev.com page uses BlastEm.
docs_sources: Official Mercurial repository includes the README.
Official retrodev.com BlastEm page is the main project documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official retrodev.com exposes the BlastEm Mercurial repository log and source browser.
tags_sources: Official retrodev.com homepage describes BlastEm as a Sega Genesis/Megadrive emulator.
